title: Control
lyrics:
[LEX「Control」歌詞]

[Intro]
Cause you control me

[Verse 1]
When you lie when you can't control it
If I die in your rule. that's so easy
It's time I'll go somewhere let her go
I found my mona lisa 俺 falling now
She said when I get happy 君も too right?
I can't see your heart in my rules
Let me go leave me alone

[Chorus]
That's why l'm so humble that's why I'm so numb
I can't see your heart in my rules
You control me cause you control me

[Verse 2]
そうしたい  end of my life
皆知ってる、死ぬのは怖い
前に前に進みたいけど
俺は2013年で止まってるよ
乗るよスワサイド行きの自爆のロケット
ノットシートベルト
信じる事は難しくて マジめんどくせぇ
1人で居たいし居たくもねぇ
マジめんどくせぇ俺
ごめん まーいっか

[Chorus]
That's why l'm so humble that's why I'm so numb
I can't see your heart in my rules
You control me cause you control me
